flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Great Basin College rose 24% between 2017 and 2020 ($12.8k → $15.8k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Great Basin College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.7% → 0.0%).
